---
title: "LOGO_CEIGRAS"
author: "CEIGRAS"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup

source("https://inkaverse.com/setup.r")
```

## Field-book

```{r}
#> Google fonts: https://fonts.google.com/

font <- c("Open Sans")
huito_fonts(font)
```

## Labels 

```{r}
label <- label_layout(size = c(3, 1.5)
               , border_color = "blue"
               , border_width = 0.5
               ) %>%
  # Logo UNTRM
  include_image(
    value = "https://gyt.untrm.edu.pe/assets/images/untrmazul.png"
    , size = c(2,2)
    , position = c(1.15, 1.1)
    ) %>% 
  include_shape(
    value = "hexagon",
    psition = c (2, 0.8),
    border_color = "blue",
    size = (4)
    )



label %>% label_print()
```

```{r}

 include_shape(
    value = "line",
    position = c (2, 0.8),
    border_color = "blue",
    size = (4)
    )

#| eval: false

label %>% 
  label_print(
    mode = "c",
    paper = c(4, 2),   # el PDF será del tamaño de la etiqueta
    nlabels = 1,
    filename = "ETIQUETA")
```

```{r}
label %>% 
  label_print(
    mode = "c",
    filename = "experimento_quinua.pdf",
    paper = c(21.0, 29.7)
  )
#FUNCIONA los guarda en documentos si no hay directorio específico
